text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru wants to stop by somewhere
before going home one day, so I go with her...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Without further ado, let's bungee jump!
choice_data_list: I think there is much ado needed here!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Well, let me explain first! In today's pair fortune,
it said that bungee jumping together would bring
us good luck!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: And that's not all! Look at the slogan!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
"Push yourself to the extremes! A bungee
experience so divine that you'll pierce the
heavens!" In other words, this will take us to the
realm of the gods!

text_block_list.name: Customer
text_block_list.text:
Urk... that jump was insane. I felt my soul leave
my body...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Eek?! Their soul left their body?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
W-we can't! My divinations are a covenant
between me and Shiraoki! I need to see this
through, no matter what!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
And I've prepared an extra special lucky charm
for the occasion!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I call it... the "survive with one HP" charm!
Whatever comes my way, I should be able to just
barely endure it! Protection guaranteed!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
This is usually reserved for video games, but I
thought it'd be perfect for regular life-or-death
situations too.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
As long as I have this, my soul should remain
firmly inside my body, a hundred percent! Hm,
make that seventy. Maybe less. Anyway, I'm sure
I'll be fine!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
C-come on! Let's give it a go and prove what a
powerful pair we are!
choice_data_list: Okay, let's give it our best shot!
Let me go instead, for the both of us.
Let me go instead, for the both of us.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
C-come on! Let's give it a go and prove what a
powerful pair we are!
choice_data_list: Okay, let's give it our best shot!
Let me go instead, for the both of us.
Let me go instead, for the both of us.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
That's the spirit! This'll be a breeze! A breezy
jump, that is!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We stand in line, waiting for our numbers to be
called. At long last...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Eek, why are we this high?! At this rate, we won't
pierce the heavens—the gods will just open the
door for us!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Y-yeah! I must steel my spirit... Glory be to the
spinach leaf! Glory be to the spinach leaf!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Gyaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oof... I felt like I was going to spew something,
and it wasn't going to be words of wisdom, that's
for sure...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Urk... Thank you... for... coming with me...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Without you here, I think I would have let my soul
leave my body out of despair...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps this experience was the hidden meaning
to my divination. An opportunity to form a strong
bond with you.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Now then! I understand this may be sudden, but
the time has come for us to put that bond to the
test!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I'm clinging to life with just one HP to my name,
so prove our bond by looking after me!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Give me a piggyback ride! Oh, or we could just
taxi it up. I really don't mind either way!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If it's our bond we're putting to the test, shouldn't
we overcome this trial together? We end up
walking home on foot instead.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! S-say it isn't so... You're proving our
friendship by putting yourself on the line?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
That's unacceptable! Sacrificing yourself like that
is not the way to go!
choice_data_list: I couldn't bear to sacrifice you.
I couldn't bear to sacrifice you.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: You're willing to go that far for me?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Our hearts truly beat as one... The great Shiraoki
is sure to understand our decision!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, I will be with you in spirit, but it won't
hurt to take this lucky charm with you as well.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I made it by hand, so it's guaranteed to bring
good fortune!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I line up to do the bungee jump on
Matikanefukukitaru's behalf.

text_block_list.name: Staff
text_block_list.text: Okay, get ready! Time to take the bungee plunge!
...ease... eep... out... her...
Please, keep looking out for her.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Thank the gods! You're back! Are you okay?
Soul's still in there, right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For a brief moment, I felt like I was in a strange
place and heard a voice speaking to me... but it
looks like I managed to get through the bungee
jump just fine.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Phew, that's good to hear. I was worried sick
waiting for you.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oh yeah! Living off of one HP must be rough, but
I bought a load of stuff while I was waiting!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I got you some nutrient-rich carrot juice and a
taiyaki that's steaming real auspiciously...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I also had a go on the claw mach—I mean, I tested
my luck and was blessed with this friendship
bracelet! Try it on!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I've looked up the bus times for us, so just relax
and enjoy!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: No, I'm the one who should be thanking you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru may be unpredictable and a
little wild in her ways, but her care is heartfelt and
genuine.
